daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is giving you permission to be a little selfish with your energy today—protect it like your favorite playlist. Something shifts when you stop people-pleasing.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, honesty hits different today. Single? That random conversation you've been avoiding might actually lead somewhere. Trust the butterflies, they know what's up.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now—don't keep them locked up. Share that thought in the meeting, send that email you've been drafting. Your confidence is your superpower today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement, not punishment. Whether it's dancing in your room or a walk that clears your head, listen to what feels good. Rest is also productive, btw.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been screaming about. Mercury's vibes are shifting, and honestly, that restless feeling? It's pointing you toward something real. Trust the plot twist.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is about getting real with yourself first. Someone might be sending signals you've been too busy to notice. The universe is basically nudging you to have the conversation you've been avoiding. It hits different when you're honest.
weekly.career: Your creative spark is literally untouchable right now. This isn't the week to play small or doubt your ideas—bring that chaotic Aries energy to your projects. One conversation could shift everything. Your vibe is magnetic; lean into it and watch who responds.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more presence, less hustle. Whether that's yoga, walks, or just actually sleeping, tune in to what feels good. Energy work and mental clarity are connected rn. Small rituals > grinding yourself to dust. You deserve to feel good in your skin.
